rationale: No conflict. Section 1201.207 governs manufactured home statement-of-ownership processing timelines and tax lien handling. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: the department shall process any completed application for the issuance of a statement of ownership not later than the 15th working day after the date the application is received by the department
_note: No operative connection between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this manufactured-home title-processing statute.
